# ΑΝΘΗ-ΦΥΤΑ KALOUDIS

> Florist and landscaping services in south Athens, Greece. Family-run business in Ηλιούπολη serving the southern Attica suburbs since many years. Fresh flowers, event decoration, garden design, maintenance, irrigation, pruning, tree removal, land clearing and pest control.

## Services

- [Wedding floral decoration](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/weddings): Church arrangements, bridal bouquets and reception styling.
- [Baptism decoration](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/baptisms): Christening floral design and church styling.
- [Church & icon decoration](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/church-icons): Patron saint feasts and religious ceremonies.
- [Reception & event decoration](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/receptions): Parties, private events and venue styling.
- [Commercial space decoration](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/commercial-spaces): Offices, hotels and shops with weekly arrangements.
- [Garden design](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/garden-design): Landscape planning and garden architecture.
- [Garden maintenance](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/maintenance): Regular upkeep of green spaces and plant care.
- [Automatic irrigation](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/irrigation): Drip and sprinkler irrigation system installation.
- [Tree pruning](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/pruning): Pruning of trees, shrubs and olive trees.
- [Tall tree removal](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/tall-trees): Safe felling of large or dangerous trees.
- [Land clearing](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/land-clearing): Lot cleanup, brush removal, fire-prevention clearing.
- [Plant pest control](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/services/pest-control): Plant disease treatment and protective spraying.

## Products

- [Flowers & plants](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/products/flowers): Fresh cut flowers, indoor and outdoor plants, rare and carnivorous species.
- [Soil & substrates](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/products/soil): Garden, pot and nursery soil plus specialized substrates.
- [Fertilizers](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/products/fertilizers): Organic and chemical fertilizers for healthy plant growth.
- [Pots & planters](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/products/pots): Ceramic, plastic and decorative pots in every size.
- [Pest-control products](https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el/products/pest-products): Insecticides, rodenticides, snake repellent, cockroach and ant solutions.

## Contact

- Address: Λεωφόρος Κυπρίων Ηρώων 4, Ηλιούπολη 16341, Αθήνα, Greece
- Phone: +30 210 9954775

- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@kipotexnikesergasies13gm

## Areas served

Ηλιούπολη, Αργυρούπολη, Δάφνη, Βύρωνας, Άλιμος, Υμηττός, Άγιος Δημήτριος, Καισαριανή, Ελληνικό, Γλυφάδα, Νέα Σμύρνη, Παλαιό Φάληρο, Καλλιθέα, Ζωγράφου, Παγκράτι, Βούλα, Βουλιαγμένη, Βάρη, Παπάγου, Χολαργός.

## Languages

- Greek (primary): https://www.anthopoleio-kaloudis.gr/el
